title: pyrus honanensis
intro: Pyrus honanensis, also known as the Shanxi pear tree, is a species of deciduous tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The bark and leaves of Pyrus honanensis contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Pyrus honanensis include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which may help protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its herbal preparations are also used in the form of capsules, tablets, and injections.
